description: Jacob Boren discusses the development of Reflect, a decentralized infrastructure for stablecoins on Solana, emphasizing its unique selling point of full decentralization and a self-contained Zkrisk engine.
topic_summary: Explore Reflect, a self-sustaining stablecoin platform on Solana that operates independently of centralized entities, featuring a verifiable Zkrisk engine for maintenance-free operation. [t=14:08]
